div.head: 2. Message From President-elect Kennedy to Chairman KhrushchevSource:American Foreign Policy: Current Documents, 1960, p. 476. No classification marking.
div.p: I am most appreciative of your courtesy in sending me a message of congratulations.Document 1. The achievement of a just and lasting peace will remain a fundamental goal of this nation and a major task of its President. I am most pleased to have your good wishes at this time.Printed from an unsigned copy.
